top_signals.title: US-Iran Tensions Put India’s Rupee Back Under Pressure as Oil Climbs
top_signals.summary: RBI measures are so far proving less effective than they were in 2013.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Goldman becomes Taiwan’s top foreign broker on AI quant push
top_signals.summary: The Wall Street bank has risen from 10th place in early 2025 to become Taiwan's largest foreign brokerage by trading volume in the first half.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Trump says he doesn't want anything to do with Spain: 'Cut off all trade'
top_signals.summary: U.S. President Donald Trump slammed Spain for not contributing enough to NATO, as he attended the defense alliance summit in Turkey.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: China Consumer Inflation Surprises by Slowing More Than Forecast - Bloomberg.com
top_signals.summary: China Consumer Inflation Surprises by Slowing More Than Forecast  Bloomberg.com
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: FMC Decision Upheld That Detention Fees During Port Closure Are Unfair
top_signals.summary: The U.S. Court of Appeals for the D.C. Circuit recently issued a decision upholding the Federal Maritime Commission’s (FMC) determination that detention fees levied on a trucker by an ocean common carrier during a three-day port closure were unreasonable.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.
